testsuite.name: dev.tidesapp.wearos.download.data.download.SegmentDownloaderTest

testcase.name: downloadSegmentToFile writes bytes to new file
downloadSegmentToFile overwrites when append is false
downloadSegmentToFile streams large data without OOM

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
